name: Strength Training
description: Build raw power and muscle with progressive overload programmes designed for all levels.
longDescription: Our strength training programmes combine compound lifts, isolation work, and periodised programming to deliver measurable results. Whether you're a beginner learning proper form or an experienced lifter chasing PRs, our trainers will build a plan that evolves with you. Each session includes a dynamic warm-up, targeted main lifts, accessory work, and a structured cool-down with mobility exercises.

name: Physiotherapy
description: Expert rehabilitation and pain management to get you back to peak performance.
longDescription: Our licensed physiotherapists specialise in sports injuries, post-surgical rehabilitation, and chronic pain management. Using evidence-based techniques including manual therapy, dry needling, and therapeutic exercise, we create recovery plans that address the root cause—not just the symptoms. Each session begins with a thorough assessment and ends with a personalised home exercise programme.

name: HIIT & Cardio
description: High-intensity intervals that torch fat and boost cardiovascular endurance fast.
longDescription: Our HIIT sessions are designed to maximise calorie burn in minimum time. Combining short bursts of all-out effort with active recovery periods, these workouts elevate your metabolism for hours after you leave. Choose from group classes or one-on-one sessions, with intensity scaled to your current fitness level. Includes heart rate zone training and post-workout recovery protocols.

name: Yoga & Mobility
description: Improve flexibility, balance, and mental clarity through guided yoga and mobility flows.
longDescription: Our yoga and mobility sessions blend traditional yoga practices with modern sports science. From Vinyasa flows that build strength and flexibility to restorative sessions focused on deep tissue release, there's something for every body. Our certified instructors guide you through breathwork, alignment cues, and modifications so you can practice safely at any level.

name: Sports Massage
description: Deep tissue and sports massage to accelerate recovery and prevent injury.
longDescription: Our sports massage therapists work with athletes of all levels to reduce muscle tension, improve range of motion, and speed up recovery between training sessions. Techniques include deep tissue work, myofascial release, trigger point therapy, and active release. Whether you're preparing for competition or recovering from a tough training block, targeted massage keeps your body performing at its best.

name: Nutrition Coaching
description: Personalised meal planning and macro coaching tailored to your performance goals.
longDescription: Our registered dietitians create eating plans that fuel your workouts, support recovery, and align with your health goals. Whether you're looking to lose fat, build muscle, optimise athletic performance, or manage a health condition, we take a science-based approach without restrictive or fad diets. Includes initial assessment, weekly check-ins, meal planning templates, and ongoing adjustments based on your progress.

name: Personal Training
description: One-on-one coaching with expert trainers who build programmes around your goals.
longDescription: Our personal training service is the cornerstone of VitalEdge. Each programme is built from scratch based on your goals, movement patterns, injury history, and schedule. Your trainer will guide every rep, adjust loads in real-time, and progressively challenge you to break through plateaus. Includes fitness assessment, programme design, nutrition tips, and between-session support via our app.

name: Mental Wellness
description: Mindfulness, stress management, and mental resilience coaching for peak performance.
longDescription: Physical health is only half the picture. Our mental wellness sessions combine mindfulness meditation, cognitive behavioural techniques, and sports psychology to help you manage stress, improve focus, and build mental resilience. Whether you're an athlete dealing with performance anxiety or a professional seeking work-life balance, our coaches provide practical tools you can use every day.

name: Pilates
description: Core-strengthening and flexibility work through controlled, low-impact movement sequences.
longDescription: Our Pilates classes focus on building core strength, improving posture, and enhancing flexibility through precise, controlled movements. Whether you're on a mat or using our Reformer equipment, each session is designed to strengthen your deep stabilising muscles and improve overall body awareness. Suitable for all fitness levels, Pilates is particularly effective for injury prevention and back pain management.

name: Weight Loss Program
description: Comprehensive fat-loss programme combining training, nutrition, and accountability coaching.
longDescription: This is not a crash diet or a quick fix. Our weight loss programme combines structured exercise, evidence-based nutrition coaching, and weekly accountability check-ins to deliver sustainable fat loss. You'll get a custom training plan, meal guidance from our dietitians, and regular body composition tracking to ensure you're losing fat—not muscle. Most clients see significant results within the first 4 weeks.

name: Rehabilitation
description: Post-injury and post-surgical rehab programmes to restore function and prevent re-injury.
longDescription: Our rehabilitation programmes are designed in collaboration with physiotherapists and orthopaedic specialists to guide you safely back to full function after injury or surgery. Each programme is individually tailored, starting with gentle range-of-motion work and progressively building strength, stability, and confidence. Whether you're recovering from a sports injury, joint replacement, or accident, we'll get you back to doing what you love.

name: Corporate Wellness
description: On-site and virtual wellness programmes designed to improve employee health and productivity.
longDescription: Our corporate wellness programmes bring health and fitness directly to your workplace. From on-site ergonomic assessments and lunchtime fitness classes to virtual wellness workshops and stress management seminars, we create customised programmes that fit your company culture and schedule. Research shows that workplace wellness programmes reduce absenteeism by 27% and increase productivity — a win for everyone.
